pageContext.name: The Book of Boba Fett™ A New Challenge
pageContext.description: No hard feelings. It's just business.   Each day brings new experiences and challenges, and The Book of Boba Fett™ - A New Challenge captures the next test that Boba Fett must face as the Daimyo™. He and Fennec Shand™ have just finished the assassin's business with Mayor Mok Shaiz™, and Boba Fett has learned that the Twins, cousins of the late Jabba the Hutt™, have laid claim to his territory. Time will again ultimately decide how Boba Fett's story plays out.  The Book of Boba Fett™ Collection presented by Thomas Kinkade Studios is a series of Limited Edition Art that captures iconic scenes from each chapter of the Star Wars™ live-action series. These lifelike works of art beautifully portray epic Star Wars stories and characters, combining the luminous techniques of Thomas Kinkade Studios with the signature style of the artist, Brian Rood.  Don't miss your chance to own The Book of Boba Fett™ A New Challenge art print. A truly beautiful addition to any Star Wars art gallery.
